emotional_tone: Prestige, classic literature, wisdom, boutique exclusivity, trust

layout_and_spacing.optical_alignment: Apply generous padding inside cards (p-8 to p-12) to avoid text collision with borders.

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F4F1EA]/80 border-b border-[#D4AF37]/20

hero.overlay: Use the 'Old Paper Texture' with mix-blend-overlay and 10% opacity to give a tactile feel to the dark background
hero.layout: Asymmetric split. Left: Massive serif headline with gold accents. Right: Floating, overlapping 3D-styled book covers.

book_cards.classes: bg-white p-8 border border-[#D4AF37]/20 rounded-none shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
book_cards.typography: Heading in Cormorant Garamond, Body in Outfit. Price in Gold.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A1128] text-white px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#D4AF37] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A1128] text-[#0A1128] px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#0A1128] hover:text-white transition-colors
buttons.gold_accent: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A1128] px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold hover:bg-[#C5A059] transition-colors

author_timeline.classes: relative border-l border-[#D4AF37]/30 ml-6 md:ml-0 md:mx-auto space-y-16
author_timeline.nodes: Absolute positioned gold dots. Content boxes offset with generous whitespace.

dashboard_author.inputs: Shadcn UI customized: border-b only or very subtle full border, focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-0

interactive_and_motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling strongly recommended (e.g., Lenis) for editorial feel.
interactive_and_motion.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (1.05) within hidden overflow containers. Text links feature expanding gold underlines.
interactive_and_motion.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in with slight upward transform (10px) on load.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and major links MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='buy-now-button', data-testid='author-submit-form').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default tailwind blue or gray.
Ensure the hero section uses the #0A1128 Navy background and #D4AF37 Gold text for maximum prestige.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing and biography pages to allow for creative, asymmetric layouts.
Use Shadcn UI for the Author Dashboard, Book Submission Form, and Checkout flows, but customize them to fit the Boutique theme (remove rounded corners, use gold focus rings).
Never center-align large blocks of text. Left-align for editorial readability.
Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Keep icon strokes thin (strokeWidth 1.5) for elegance.
Implement the 'Selo de Aprovação do Dono' as a prominent gold badge visual on approved books.
